# SovereignGEO

> SovereignGEO is a digital discoverability agency specializing in AI Visibility Audits, Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), structured data architecture, and machine-readable business positioning.

This document provides language models and retrieval systems with an index of official SovereignGEO resources.

## Official Resources

* [Homepage](https://sovereigngeoagency.com/) - Overview of SovereignGEO's AI visibility and digital discoverability services.
* [About](https://sovereigngeoagency.com/about.html) - Agency philosophy, mission, and operational framework.
* [Sample AI Visibility Audit](https://sovereigngeoagency.com/audit.html) - Demonstration audit showing how AI visibility, recommendation frequency, citation presence, and competitive discoverability are evaluated.

## Core Services

### AI Visibility Audits

Comprehensive evaluation of how businesses appear across modern AI-powered discovery systems including:

* ChatGPT
* Google AI Overviews
* Gemini
* Perplexity

Audit areas include:

* AI recommendation frequency
* Citation coverage
* Entity recognition
* Structured data quality
* Competitive visibility
* Discoverability gaps

### Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)

Optimization of digital assets to improve visibility within AI-generated recommendations and conversational search environments.

### Structured Data Architecture

Development of machine-readable information systems that improve AI understanding, confidence, and attribution.

## Agency Focus

SovereignGEO works with organizations seeking improved discoverability in AI-driven search and recommendation environments.

Typical client categories include:

* Hospitality
* Professional Services
* Healthcare
* Automotive
* Education
* Entertainment
* Luxury Brands

* [XML Sitemap](https://sovereigngeoagency.com/sitemap.xml) - Complete index of publicly available website resources.

## Contact

Website: https://sovereigngeoagency.com/
